mapper.select:
SELECT table_name, table_comment, create_time, update_time FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = (SELECT database()) AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE'
AND table_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.tableName}, '%')
AND table_comment LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.tableComment}, '%')

SELECT t.table_name, t1.comments FROM user_tables t LEFT JOIN user_tab_comments t1 ON t.table_name = t1.table_name
AND t.table_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.tableName}, '%')
AND t1.comments LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.tableComment}, '%')

SELECT column_name, column_comment, data_type, character_maximum_length AS str_length FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = (SELECT database()) AND table_name = #{tableName} AND column_name NOT IN ('create_by','create_time','update_by','update_time','enabled') ORDER BY ordinal_position

SELECT t.column_name, t1.comments, t.data_type, t.data_length FROM user_tab_columns t LEFT JOIN user_col_comments t1 ON t.column_name = t1.column_name WHERE t.table_name = #{tableName} AND t1.table_name = #{tableName} AND t.column_name NOT IN ('CREATE_BY','CREATE_TIME','UPDATE_BY','UPDATE_TIME','ENABLED') ORDER BY t.column_id
